title: Auto Arc
description: Automatisierter Arc Furnace – schaltet sich basierend auf Erzbestand ein/aus
code:
#Only set screws eqaul to the number of furnaces

alias Arc1 d0
alias Arc2 d1
alias Arc3 d2
alias Arc4 d3
alias Arc5 d4
alias Arc6orVan d5

s d0 On 1 #turns power on of furnace
bdns d1 12 #skip d1 screw if not set
s d1 On 1
bdns d2 14 #skip d2 screw if not set
s d2 On 1
bdns d3 16 #skip d3 screw if not set
s d3 On 1
bdns d4 18
s d4 On 1
bdns d5 20
s d5 On 1

bdns d0 arc2 #skip d1 screw if not set
arc1:
l r0 d0 RecipeHash
l r1 d0 Activate
beq r1 1 28
sne r0 r0 0
s d0 Activate r0

arc2:
bdns d1 arc3 #skip d1 screw if not set
l r0 d1 RecipeHash
l r1 d1 Activate
beq r1 1 36
sne r0 r0 0
s d1 Activate r0

arc3:
bdns d2 arc4
l r0 d2 RecipeHash
l r1 d2 Activate
beq r1 1 44
sne r0 r0 0
s d2 Activate r0

arc4:
bdns d3 arc5
l r0 d3 RecipeHash
l r1 d3 Activate
beq r1 1 52
sne r0 r0 0
s d3 Activate r0

arc5:
bdns d4 arc6orvan
l r0 d4 RecipeHash
l r1 d4 Activate
beq r1 1 60
sne r0 r0 0
s d4 Activate r0

arc6orvan:
bdns d5 end
l r0 d5 PrefabHash
beq r0 -1129453144 isvan

l r0 d5 RecipeHash
l r1 d5 Activate
beq r1 1 68
sne r0 r0 0
s d5 Activate r0
j end
isvan:
sne r0 r0 0
s d5 On 1
s d5 PressureExternal 180
s d5 PressureInternal 0
s d5 Mode 0
end:
yield
j arc1

title: AutoRocket
description: Vollautomatische Raketensteuerung mit Eis/Erz-Mining, Treibstoffmanagement und Rückkehr
code:
alias rocket d0
alias launchButton d1
alias Dail d2
alias display1 d3
alias display2 d4
alias display3 d5
alias fuelLeft r0
alias returnFuel r1
alias mode r2
alias state r3
alias quantity r4
alias quantityMax r5
alias quantityLast r6
alias count r7

j Returnhome
s Dail Mode 2
move quantityMax 600
Init:
yield
s rocket Activate 0
sb 906210602 Open 0
lb quantity 906210602 Quantity 1
bgtz quantity Unload
jal displaySYS
bge 2000 fuelLeft Init
WaitLaunch:
jal displaySYS
l state launchButton Setting
move quantityLast 0
move count 0
beq state 1 Launching
yield
j WaitLaunch
Launching:
sb -828056979 Mode 36
sb -828056979 On 1
wait:
yield
s rocket Activate 1
jal displaySYS
beq mode 4 CheckAvlResources
j wait
StartMining:
l r10 Dail Setting
sle r11 r10 1
sb 74521920 Activate r11 #Eis
sge r11 r10 1
sb -2027419821 Activate r11 #Erz
lb quantity 906210602 Quantity 1
jal displaySYS
jal checkFuel
bge quantity quantityMax Returnhome
l state launchButton Setting
beq state 1 Returnhome
CheckAvlResources:
yield
s rocket Activate 0
jal displaySYS
l state rocket CollectableGoods
add count count 1
jal checkFuel
bge count 10 testcount
bnez state StartMining
testcount:
beq quantityLast quantity StartTravel
move quantityLast quantity
move count 0
j StartMining
StartTravel:
jal checkFuel
s rocket Activate 2
jal displaySYS
move count 0
Travel:
yield
jal displaySYS
beq mode 3 CheckAvlResources
beq mode 4 CheckAvlResources
j Travel
Returnhome:
s rocket Activate 0
s rocket Activate 5
Returning:
jal displaySYS
beq mode 0 Unload
yield
j Returning
Unload:
lb quantity 906210602 Quantity 1
beq quantity 0 Init
jal displaySYS
sb 906210602 Open 1
yield
j Unload
checkFuel:
l fuelLeft rocket Fuel
l returnFuel rocket ReturnFuelCost
mul returnFuel returnFuel 1.5
bge returnFuel fuelLeft Returnhome
j ra
displaySYS:
l mode rocket Mode
l fuelLeft rocket Fuel
s display1 Setting mode
s display3 Setting fuelLeft
breq mode 2 4
s display2 Mode 0
s display2 Setting quantity
j ra

div r10 1 quantityMax
mul r10 quantity r10
s display2 Mode 1
s display2 Setting r10
j ra

title: Beheizter luft sammler
description: Beheizter Gaseinlass – öffnet Ventil bei korrekter Temperatur für Tankbefüllung
code:
alias tank d0
alias van d1
alias sensor d2
alias valve d3
alias out d4

alias temp1 r0
alias temp2 r1
start:

s van PressureInternal 2000
s van On 1
l temp1 tank Temperature
l temp2 sensor Temperature

slt r10 temp1 307
sgt r11 temp2 307
and r12 r11 r10
s db Setting r12
s valve On r12

sgt r10 temp1 300
s out On r10
j start

title: Cooling Room
description: Temperaturregelung mit Kühler und Sollwertvorgabe via Poti, inkl. Türsteuerung
code:
alias Cooler d0
alias Sensor d1
alias Dail d2
alias Display d3
alias Door d4
alias Door2 d4

alias temp r0
alias target r1
alias targetold r2
alias celsius r3
alias doorstate r4
s Dail Mode 303
s Dail Setting 268
move targetold 0

start:
s Display Color 0
Cycle:
jal doorsys
l target Dail Setting
l temp Sensor Temperature
bne target targetold Change
sub celsius temp 273.15
s Display Setting celsius
add target target 1
bgt temp target Cooling
s Cooler On 0 #If not turn off cooler
yield
yield
j Cycle

Cooling:
jal doorsys
l target Dail Setting
l temp Sensor Temperature
bne target targetold Change
sub celsius temp 273.15
s Display Setting celsius
ble temp target Cycle
s Cooler On 1 #If so Turn on Cooler
yield
yield
j Cooling

Change:
s Display Color 3
sub celsius target 273
s Display Setting celsius
beq target targetold wait
move targetold target
l target Dail Setting
yield
j Change

wait:
yield
yield
l target Dail Setting
bne target targetold Change
j start

doorsys:
bdns Door ra
yield
yield
s Door Open 0
bdns Door2 ra
s Door2 Open 0
j ra

title: Easy Gasgen Mars
description: Gas Generator Regelung für Mars – CO2-Sammeln, Batteriemanagement und PD-Temperaturregelung
code:
#Devices
alias Door d0
alias GasSensorExt d1
alias CoolantInPwr d2
alias CoolantTank d3
alias GasGen d4
alias GasSensorInt d5

#Registers
alias doorOpen r0
alias doorClosed r1
alias tankPres r2
alias tankPresOkay r3
alias andResult r4
alias avgBattRatio r5
alias battLoSet r6
alias temp r7 #Multiuse
alias tempOkay r8 #Multiuse
alias battHiSet r9
alias inputSignal r10
alias E0 r11 #Error current
alias E1 r12 #Error previous cycle
alias chE r13 #Change in error
alias Deriv r14 #Derivative
alias KpE0 r15 #Proportional gain times error
alias KdDeriv r16 #Derivative gain times derivative
alias outputSignal r17

#Static values
define setpoint 313
define chT 0.5 #Change in time
define Kp 4.8 #Proportional gain
define Kd 0.04 #Derivative gain

Start:
#Door state
l doorOpen Door Open
nor doorClosed doorOpen doorOpen

#Run active vents for coolant collection
l tankPres CoolantTank Pressure
slt tankPresOkay tankPres 50000
l temp GasSensorExt Temperature
slt tempOkay temp 253
and andResult tankPresOkay tempOkay
s CoolantInPwr On andResult

#Active vent settings
sb -1129453144 On doorClosed #Active vents
sb -1129453144 PressureExternal 285 #Active vents

#Control gas generator
lb avgBattRatio -1388288459 Ratio Average #Batteries
slt battLoSet avgBattRatio 0.80
l temp GasSensorInt Temperature
slt tempOkay temp 328
and andResult doorClosed battLoSet
and andResult andResult tempOkay
breqz andResult 2
s GasGen On 1
sgt battHiSet avgBattRatio 0.98
breqz battHiSet 2
s GasGen On 0

#Power pumps
sb -321403609 On doorClosed

#Proportional derivative temperature control
l inputSignal GasSensorInt Temperature
#Save prev error, new error
move E1 E0
sub E0 inputSignal setpoint
#Change in error, derivative
sub chE E1 E0
div Deriv chE chT
#Final calcs
mul KpE0 Kp E0
mul KdDeriv Kd Deriv
add outputSignal KpE0 KdDeriv
#End
sb -321403609 Setting outputSignal

yield
j Start

title: Nutriose
description: Steuert den Nutrient-Paste-Dispenser basierend auf Druck- und Temperaturwerten
code:
alias mixer d0io
alias pressIn r0
alias tempIn r1
alias pressureOut r2
alias tempOut r3
alias pressWasteOut r4
alias tempWasteOut r5

alias workPress r6
alias workTemp r7

move workPress 200
move workTemp 30

s db Mode 0
add workTemp workTemp 273

start:
yield
l pressIn db PressureInput
l tempIn db TemperatureInput
l pressureOut db PressureOutput
l pressWasteOut db PressureOutput2

sgt r10 pressIn workPress
sgt r11 tempIn workTemp
sgt r12 pressIn pressureOut
sgt r13 pressIn pressWasteOut

and r14 r10 r11
and r15 r12 r13

and r16 r14 r15

s db Mode r16

j start

title: Ofen Heizer
description: Furnace-Heizungsregelung mit Ventilsteuerung basierend auf Temperatur
code:
alias Sensor d0
alias Vent d1
alias Display d2
alias Lever d3

alias temp r1
alias press r2
define maxtemp 1600 #Grad
define maxpress 10000

loop:
l temp Sensor Temperature
l press Sensor Pressure
sub temp temp 273
s Display Setting temp

l r0 Lever Setting
bnez r0 alloff

sge r0 maxtemp temp
sb -419758574 On r0

s Vent Mode 1
bge maxpress press loop
s Vent On 0


yield
j loop

alloff:
sb -419758574 On 0
s Vent On 0
yield
j loop

stop:
sb -419758574 On 0
s Vent On 0

title: PowerAIO
description: Autarke Power- und Wasserregelung – Fission-Reaktor, Turbine, Batterieladung, Water Filtration
code:
alias CableIN d0
alias CableOUT d1
alias Dail d2

alias LEDGeneration d3
alias LEDAkku d4
alias LEDUsage d5

alias battratio r0
alias potent r1
alias require r2
alias disp r3
alias smallbatt r4
alias largebatt r5
alias dailvalue r6

move dailvalue 0.5

start:
lb smallbatt -400115994 Ratio 0
lb largebatt -1388288459 Ratio 0
bgez largebatt islarge
move battratio smallbatt
j issmall
islarge:
move battratio largebatt
issmall:

l potent CableIN PowerPotential
l require CableOUT PowerRequired

bdns Dail nodail
s Dail Mode 100
l dailvalue Dail Setting
div dailvalue dailvalue 100
nodail:

s d3 Mode 2
alias disp d3
bgeal potent require blue
bltal potent require yellow
s d3 Setting potent

s d4 Mode 1
alias disp d4
bleal battratio 0.6 yellow
bleal battratio 0.3 red
bgtal battratio 0.6 green
s d4 Setting r0

s d5 Mode 2
alias disp d5
bltal require potent yellow
bgeal require potent red
s d5 Setting require

yield

bgt battratio dailvalue genoff
blt battratio 0.1 genon
j start

genon:
sb 813146305 On 1
j start

genoff:
sb 813146305 On 0
j start

green:
s disp Color 2
j ra
yellow:
s disp Color 5
j ra
red:
s disp Color 4
j ra
blue:
s disp Color 0
j ra

title: Sorter1
description: Erzsortierer für Eisen, Kupfer, Silizium, Silber, Gold mittels OccupantHash
code:
alias iron d0
alias copper d1
alias silicon d2
alias silver d3
alias gold d4


start:
s iron Output -1
s iron Mode 2
ls r1 iron 0 Occupied
beqz r1 loop1
ls r1 iron 0 OccupantHash
beq r1 1758427767 true0 #iron
s iron Output 0
j loop1
true0:
s iron Output 1

loop1:
# 2nd sorter---------------
s copper Output -1
s copper Mode 2
ls r2 copper 0 Occupied
beqz r2 loop2
ls r2 copper 0 OccupantHash
beq r2 -707307845 true1 #copper
s copper Output 0
j loop2

loop2:
#3rd sorter----------------

ls r3 silicon 0 Occupied

s silver Output 0
j loop4
true3:

loop4:
#5th sorter---------------
s gold Output -1
s gold Mode 2
ls r5 gold 0 Occupied
beqz r5 start
ls r5 gold 0 OccupantHash
beq r5 -1348105509 true4 #gold
s gold Output 0
j start
true4:

#------------------------
j start

title: Tank
description: Druckregelung für bis zu 3 Gastanks mit Zuschaltung von Pumpen
code:
alias Tank0 d0
alias Tank1 d1
alias Tank2 d2
alias Pump0 d3
alias Pump1 d4
alias Pump2 d5

alias status r0

tank0:
bdns Tank0 tank1
l status Tank0 Pressure
beq status 0 tank0ok
bge status 6500 tank0ok
s Pump0 On 1
j tank1
tank0ok:
s Pump0 On 0

tank1:
bdns Tank1 tank2
l status Tank1 Pressure
beq status 0 tank1ok
bge status 6500 tank1ok
s Pump1 On 1
j tank2
tank1ok:
s Pump1 On 0

tank2:
bdns Tank2 tankend
l status Tank2 Pressure
beq status 0 tank2ok
bge status 6500 tank2ok
s Pump2 On 1
j tankend
tank2ok:
s Pump2 On 0

tankend:
yield
j tank0

title: Wetter_Zeit
description: Solaruhr mit Wetteranzeige – zeigt Uhrzeit, Countdown, Temperatur und Wetteralarm auf Displays
code:
alias Sens d0 # Sensor nach Norden 0 Ausgerichtet
alias WSta d1 # Wetterstation (opt.)
alias GSen d2 # Gassensor (opt.)
alias DspH d3 # Display fuer Stundenanzeige (opt.)
alias DspC d4 # Display fuer Minuten (opt.)
alias DspG d5 # Display fuer Countdown (opt.)
#--------------------
# Settings
define HOffset 8 # Horizontaler Offset
define ColorDay 5 # Farbe bei Tag
define ColorNight 3 # Farbe bei Nacht
define ColorStorm 4 # Farbe bei Unwetter

alias time r0
alias hour r1
alias minute r2
alias angle r3
alias tmp1 r4
alias countdown r5
alias DspColor r6
alias Weatherstate r7
alias Weathertime r8
alias mStep r14
alias maxAngle r15

ICInit:
mul maxAngle HOffset 2
sub maxAngle 180 maxAngle
div mStep maxAngle 720

Weather:
bdns WSta GasTemp
l Weatherstate WSta Mode
l Weathertime WSta NextWeatherEventTime
trunc Weathertime Weathertime
sge tmp1 Weathertime 1
blt Weathertime 1 noalarm
blt Weathertime 10 alarm
noalarm:
sb -828056979 Mode 18
sb -828056979 On tmp1
sb -1535893860 On tmp1
j GasTemp
alarm:
sb -828056979 Mode 10
sb -324331872 Open 0
GasTemp:
bdns GSen CheckAMPM
bdns DspG CheckAMPM
l tmp1 GSen Temperature
sub tmp1 tmp1 273
s DspG Setting tmp1
ble tmp1 0 Tlow
bge tmp1 30 Thigh
s DspG Color 3
j CheckAMPM
Tlow:
s DspG Color 0
j CheckAMPM
Thigh:
s DspG Color 4

CheckAMPM:
l tmp1 Sens SolarAngle
sub tmp1 tmp1 HOffset
sleep 0.01
l angle Sens SolarAngle
sub angle angle HOffset
div time angle mStep
bgt tmp1 angle AM
blt tmp1 angle PM

AM:
sub time 720 time
bge time 360 X1
blt time 360 X2
X1:
sub countdown 1080 time
move DspColor ColorDay
j Calc
X2:
sub countdown 360 time
move DspColor ColorNight
j Calc

PM:
add time 720 time
bge time 1080 X3
blt time 1080 X4
X3:
sub countdown 1800 time
move DspColor ColorNight
j Calc
X4:
sub countdown 1080 time
move DspColor ColorDay
j Calc

Calc:
div time time 60
trunc hour time
sub minute time hour
mul minute minute 100
mul minute minute 60
div minute minute 100
trunc minute minute

bdns DspH DisplayCountdown
div minute minute 100
add time hour minute
s DspH Setting time
s DspH Color DspColor
j DisplayCountdown

DisplayCountdown:
bdns DspC Weather
trunc countdown countdown
s DspC Setting countdown
s DspC Color DspColor
bne Weatherstate 1 Weather
s DspC Setting Weathertime
s DspC Color ColorStorm
j Weather

title: autovalve
description: Automatisches Auslassventil – öffnet bei Überdruck im Tank
code:
alias sensor d0
alias led d1 #opt
alias display d2 #opt

alias temp r0
alias target r1
alias range r2
alias celsius r3
alias heaters r4
alias coolers r5

#---- Config ------
move target 20 #Celsius
move range 1 #temp diverence
move heaters -287495560 #Hash
move coolers -739292323 #Hash
#---- Config END ------
start:
brdns led 2
s led On 0
add target target 273
yield

Cycle:
l temp sensor Temperature
brdns display 3
sub celsius temp 273.15
s display Setting celsius

add r6 target range
brlt temp r6 3
sb heaters On 0
j skip

sub r6 target range
brlt temp r6 3
sub r6 target range
bgt temp r6 skip
sb heaters On 1

skip:
sub r6 target range
brgt temp r6 3
sb coolers On 0
j Cycle

add r6 target range
brgt temp r6 3
add r6 target range
blt temp r6 Cycle
sb coolers On 1
j Cycle

code:

brgt temp r6 3

title: H2O2 Generator
description: Selbstregulierendes H2/O2 Gemisch für Gas Generator mit Batteriemanagement (Hysterese 20-90%), Mischungsregelung (67% H2, 33% O2) und Überdruckschutz (>8000 kPa)
code:
# Selbstregulierendes H2/O2 Gemisch fuer Gas Generator
# Self-regulating H2/O2 fuel mix for gas generator
#
# Hardware (im IC10 Chip einstellen):
#   d0 = Electrolyzer           - Spaltet Wasser in H2 + O2
#   d1 = Gas Generator          - Erzeugt Strom aus Brennstoff
#   d2 = Mix Tank               - Puffertank fuer das H2/O2 Gemisch
#   d3 = H2 Pump                - Pipe Vol. Pump (H2 Ausgang -> Tank)
#   d4 = O2 Pump                - Pipe Vol. Pump (O2 Ausgang -> Tank)
#   d5 = Pipe Analyzer          - Analysiert Gas im Mix Tank
#   d6 = konsolen-display (optional)
#
# Funktionsweise:
#   - Electrolyzer produziert H2+O2 im idealen 2:1 Verhaeltnis
#   - Batterieladung steuert An/Aus (Hysterese: 20%-90%)
#   - Pumps werden geregelt um optimale Mischung zu halten
#   - Ueberdruckschutz schaltet bei >8000 kPa ab
#   - Bei zu wenig Druck (<50 kPa) geht Generator aus

alias Electrolyzer d0
alias Generator d1
alias MixTank d2
alias H2Pump d3
alias O2Pump d4
alias Analyzer d5
alias Display d6

# ---- Konstanten ----
define BATT_THRESHOLD_ON 0.20     # Einschalten bei 20%
define BATT_THRESHOLD_OFF 0.90    # Ausschalten bei 90%
define MAX_PRESSURE 8000          # Maximaldruck in kPa
define MIN_PRESSURE 50            # Minimaldruck in kPa
define O2_TARGET 33               # Ziel: 33% Sauerstoff
define H2_TARGET 67               # Ziel: 67% Wasserstoff (Volatiles)
define MIX_TOLERANCE 5            # Toleranz +/- 5%
define PUMP_SPEED_LOW 20          # Langsame Pumpen-Geschwindigkeit
define PUMP_SPEED_HIGH 80         # Schnelle Pumpen-Geschwindigkeit

# ---- Variablen ----
alias battRatio r0
alias tankPres r1
alias o2Pct r2
alias h2Pct r3
alias o2Error r4
alias h2Error r5
alias systemOn r6

Start:
    # 1. Batteriestand lesen (Average ueber alle Station Batteries)
    lb battRatio -1388288459 Ratio Average
    # 2. Tankdruck lesen
    l tankPres Analyzer Pressure
    # 3. Gaszusammensetzung lesen
    l o2Pct Analyzer RatioOxygen
    l h2Pct Analyzer RatioVolatiles
    # In Prozent umrechnen
    mul o2Pct o2Pct 100
    mul h2Pct h2Pct 100

    # ---- Sicherheitspruefungen ----
    # Ueberdruck? -> sofort alles aus
    bgt tankPres MAX_PRESSURE EmergencyShutdown
    # Zu wenig Gas? -> Generator aus, Electrolyzer laeuft weiter
    blt tankPres MIN_PRESSURE NoFuel

    # ---- Batterie-Hysterese ----
    # Unter Einschaltschwelle? -> Anschalten
    blt battRatio BATT_THRESHOLD_ON TurnOn
    # Ueber Ausschaltschwelle? -> Ausschalten
    bgt battRatio BATT_THRESHOLD_OFF TurnOff
    # Im Mittelbereich: Status halten
    bnez systemOn RegulateMix
    j TurnOff

TurnOn:
    s Electrolyzer On 1
    s H2Pump On 1
    s O2Pump On 1
    s Generator On 1
    move systemOn 1
    j RegulateMix

TurnOff:
    s H2Pump On 0
    s O2Pump On 0
    s Generator On 0
    # Electrolyzer nur aus wenn Batterie wirklich voll
    bgt battRatio 0.95 2
    s Electrolyzer On 0
    move systemOn 0
    j DisplayOutput

NoFuel:
    # Kein Brennstoff -> Generator aus, weiter produzieren
    s Generator On 0
    bnez systemOn 2
    s H2Pump On 1
    s O2Pump On 1
    j RegulateMix

EmergencyShutdown:
    # KRITISCH: Ueberdruck! Alles aus.
    s Electrolyzer On 0
    s Generator On 0
    s H2Pump On 0
    s O2Pump On 0
    move systemOn 0
    j DisplayOutput

    # ---- Mischungsregelung ----
RegulateMix:
    # O2 Abweichung vom Ziel berechnen
    sub o2Error o2Pct O2_TARGET
    # H2 Abweichung vom Ziel berechnen
    sub h2Error h2Pct H2_TARGET

    # O2 zu niedrig?
    sub r10 O2_TARGET MIX_TOLERANCE
    blt o2Pct r10 SpeedUpO2
    # O2 zu hoch?
    add r10 O2_TARGET MIX_TOLERANCE
    bgt o2Pct r10 SlowDownO2
    # O2 im Zielbereich
    s O2Pump Setting 50
    j CheckH2

SpeedUpO2:
    s O2Pump Setting PUMP_SPEED_HIGH
    j CheckH2

SlowDownO2:
    s O2Pump Setting PUMP_SPEED_LOW
    j CheckH2

CheckH2:
    sub r10 H2_TARGET MIX_TOLERANCE
    blt h2Pct r10 SpeedUpH2
    add r10 H2_TARGET MIX_TOLERANCE
    bgt h2Pct r10 SlowDownH2
    # H2 im Zielbereich
    s H2Pump Setting 50
    j DisplayOutput

SpeedUpH2:
    s H2Pump Setting PUMP_SPEED_HIGH
    j DisplayOutput

SlowDownH2:
    s H2Pump Setting PUMP_SPEED_LOW
    j DisplayOutput

    # ---- Display Anzeige (optional) ----
DisplayOutput:
    bdns Display CycleEnd
    # Display 1: Batteriestand in %
    mul r10 battRatio 100
    s Display Setting r10
    s Display Mode 1

CycleEnd:
    yield
    j Start
